method: full-resolution pixel inspection of every screenshot

scenarios.name: flowchart
scenarios.review: Recognizable decision flow; labels are unclipped; yes/no branches are legible; connectors visibly attach; hierarchy and spacing are clear.

scenarios.name: architecture
scenarios.review: Recognizable framed pipeline; increased connector gaps leave visible continuous routes around labels; annotations remain inside the frame; no clipped labels or detached edges.

scenarios.name: sequence
scenarios.review: Three actors, aligned lifelines, and chronologically descending messages are recognizable; message text and arrow direction remain legible with no collisions.

scenarios.name: mind-map
scenarios.review: Central topic and four balanced outward branches are immediately recognizable; all labels, arrows, and colored categories are clear and unclipped.

scenarios.name: annotated-image
scenarios.review: Dashboard image is readable; three numbered callouts attach to distinct regions; labels and image text have adequate contrast and no clipping.

limitations: Generated screenshots and reports are CI artifacts and remain ignored; this durable file records the reviewed conclusion.

Clean CI regenerates screenshots and reruns semantic/overlap/console gates, but it does not reproduce the human pixel judgment; this file is a dated review attestation, not an automated visual-regression baseline.
Pixel review covers the deterministic 1440x900 capture; responsive behavior remains covered separately by browser accessibility/runtime checks.
